creator: rnejdl@ringofsaturn.com
text:
I am unable to compile audacity-devel and receive the following error:

c++ -c -O2 -pipe -march=nocona -fno-strict-aliasing -I../lib-src/portmixer/include -I../lib-src/portaudio-v19/include -O2 -pipe -march=nocona -fno-strict-aliasing  -Wall -I/usr/local/lib/wx/include/gtk2-unicode-release-2.8 -I/usr/local/include/wx-2.8 -D_FILE_OFFSET_BITS=64 -D_LARGE_FILES -D__WXGTK__ -pthread -D_THREAD_SAFE -I../lib-src/FileDialog -O2 -pipe -march=nocona -fno-strict-aliasing -Wall -I/usr/ports/audio/audacity-devel/work/audacity-src-1.3.11-beta/lib-src/lib-widget-extra    -I/usr/local/include   -I/usr/local/include     -I../lib-src/libresample/include -I../lib-src/sbsms/include -I../lib-src/libnyquist -I../lib-src/libvamp  -I/usr/local/include   -I/usr/local/include   -O2 -pipe -march=nocona -fno-strict-aliasing -Wall -I/usr/ports/audio/audacity-devel/work/audacity-src-1.3.11-beta/lib-src/portsmf   -I/usr/local/include/taglib   -fno-strict-aliasing -I./include -I. -DLIBDIR=\"/usr/local/lib\" -D__STDC_CONSTANT_MACROS  -I/usr/ports/audio/audacity-devel/work/audac

How-To-Repeat: Try to compile audacity-devel with a current port tree.
